title: Anna y su Amigo el Dragón
story_name: Anna y su Amigo el Dragón
dedication: Para Anna, con todo el amor del mundo. Que cada página te recuerde lo especial que eres.

pages.text: Una soleada mañana, Anna descubrió algo extraordinario escondido detrás del viejo roble del jardín. ¡Era un pequeño dragón con escamas de esmeralda brillante y grandes ojos dorados! El dragoncito parecía asustado y solo. "No tengas miedo", susurró Anna suavemente. "No te haré daño."
pages.text_above: Una soleada mañana, Anna descubrió algo extraordinario escondido detrás del viejo roble del jardín. ¡Era un pequeño dragón con escamas de esmeralda brillante y grandes ojos dorados!
pages.text_below: El dragoncito parecía asustado y solo. "No tengas miedo", susurró Anna suavemente. "No te haré daño."
pages.scene_prompt: Disney Pixar 3D style illustration. CHARACTER: A single little girl (3 year old), jet black medium-length straight hair, deep black eyes, light peach with warm rosy undertones skin, curious wonder-filled expression, gentle smile. OUTFIT: Soft blue tunic with gold leaf embroidery, brown pants, small boots. ACTION: little girl is standing beside a majestic old oak tree, looking UP in amazement at SPARK: A massive baby dragon with the proportions of a puppy but the size of a giant. Spark is a huge creature, TOWERING over the little girl. He has shimmering emerald-green scales, a very chubby and round body, large golden eyes, and small translucent wings. He has a soft cream-colored belly and two tiny horns. His mass is five times larger than the little girl who has just stepped out from behind the trunk. Spark stands at FULL HEIGHT towering over little girl, Spark tilts head curiously looking DOWN at little girl, tiny puff of sparkly smoke coming from Spark's snout. SETTING: Enchanted garden WIDE VIEW, glowing flowers, butterflies, mushroom circles, stone path, morning golden sunlight filtering through tree canopy. ATMOSPHERE: Discovery and wonder, warm golden light, magical sparkles in the air. STRICT: Only ONE little girl, only ONE baby dragon Spark. Spark MUST BE TWICE AS TALL as little girl. little girl is 100% human, with a completely normal body, two arms, two legs, smooth skin, and normal child anatomy, no duplicates. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

pages.text: El pequeño dragón inclinó la cabeza con curiosidad y soltó una pequeña bocanada de humo brillante. Anna se arrodilló y extendió la mano con cuidado. El dragoncito olisqueó los dedos de Anna y frotó su cabecita contra su palma. En ese momento nació una amistad mágica. Anna decidió llamarlo Chispa.
pages.text_above: El pequeño dragón inclinó la cabeza con curiosidad y soltó una pequeña bocanada de humo brillante. Anna se arrodilló y extendió la mano con cuidado.
pages.text_below: El dragoncito olisqueó los dedos de Anna y frotó su cabecita contra su palma. En ese momento nació una amistad mágica. Anna decidió llamarlo Chispa.
pages.scene_prompt: Disney Pixar 3D style illustration. OUTFIT: Soft blue tunic with gold leaf embroidery, brown pants, small boots. ACTION: little girl is standing on soft grass, reaching UP with one hand to touch Spark's face. SPARK: A massive baby dragon with the proportions of a puppy but the size of a giant. Spark is a huge creature, TOWERING over the little girl. Spark MUST BE TWICE AS TALL as little girl. little girl is 100% human, with a completely normal body, two arms, two legs, smooth skin, and normal child anatomy, no duplicates. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

pages.text: Anna y Chispa se convirtieron en los mejores amigos. Cada día jugaban juntos en secreto en el jardín encantado. Chispa perseguía mariposas soltando chispitas de colores mientras Anna reía sin parar. ¡Nunca se había divertida tanto!
pages.text_above: Anna y Chispa se convirtieron en los mejores amigos. Cada día jugaban juntos en secreto en el jardín encantado.
pages.text_below: Chispa perseguía mariposas soltando chispitas de colores mientras Anna reía sin parar. ¡Nunca se había divertida tanto!
pages.scene_prompt: Disney Pixar 3D style illustration. CHARACTER 1: The human little girl (3 year old), jet black medium-length straight hair, deep black eyes, light peach with warm rosy undertones skin, laughing with joy. A normal human body, two arms, two legs, smooth skin. OUTFIT: Soft blue tunic with gold leaf embroidery, brown pants, small boots. CHARACTER 2: Spark, the giant baby dragon, TOWERING over the little girl. Spark is three times the little girl's height, with shimmering emerald-green scales, a very chubby round body, large golden eyes, small translucent wings, cream-colored belly. ACTION: The little girl runs through a wide garden while the massive dragon Spark jumps playfully beside the little girl. Spark releases rainbow sparkles from his snout. SETTING: WIDE ANGLE VIEW of an enchanted garden, lush green lawns, colorful butterflies, and ancient trees. COMPOSITION: The little girl is small and human; Spark is a separate, massive, and giant emerald creature. The scale difference is immense. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

pages.text: Una noche, Chispa le enseñó a Anna un secreto especial. En lo profundo del jardín crecían flores que brillaban bajo la luz de la luna. Anna tocó un pétalo y una lluvia de destellos dorados llenó el aire. "Esta magia solo aparece para quienes tienen un corazón bondadoso", dijo Chispa.
pages.text_above: Una noche, Chispa le enseñó a Anna un secreto especial. En lo profundo del jardín crecían flores que brillaban bajo la luz de la luna.
pages.text_below: Anna tocó un pétalo y una lluvia de destellos dorados llenó el aire. "Esta magia solo aparece para quienes tienen un corazón bondadoso", dijo Chispa.
pages.scene_prompt: Disney Pixar 3D style illustration. CHARACTER 1: The human little girl (3 year old), jet black medium-length straight hair, deep black eyes, light peach with warm rosy undertones skin, kneeling with a look of wonder. A normal human body, two arms, two legs, smooth skin. OUTFIT: Soft blue tunic with gold leaf embroidery, brown pants, small boots. CHARACTER 2: Spark, the giant baby dragon, sitting beside the little girl. Even sitting, Spark is massive and twice as tall as the little girl, with shimmering emerald-green scales, a very chubby round body, large golden eyes, small translucent wings, cream-colored belly. ACTION: The little girl's human hand touches a glowing flower. Spark watches with a kind smile, his huge emerald body filling the frame next to the little girl. SETTING: WIDE ANGLE moonlit garden, bioluminescent blue flowers, silvery starlight, and soft mist. COMPOSITION: A tiny human child next to a towering, massive giant dragon. Clear physical separation between the child and the creature. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

pages.text: Una tarde, Chispa se veía triste. Sus alitas estaban caídas. "Echo de menos a mi familia en las montañas", dijo con una vocecita. El corazón de Anna se llenó de ternura. "Te ayudaré a encontrar el camino a casa", prometió Anna, abrazando fuerte al pequeño dragón.
pages.text_above: Una tarde, Chispa se veía triste. Sus alitas estaban caídas. "Echo de menos a mi familia en las montañas", dijo con una vocecita.
pages.text_below: El corazón de Anna se llenó de ternura. "Te ayudaré a encontrar el camino a casa", prometió Anna, abrazando fuerte al pequeño dragón.
pages.scene_prompt: Disney Pixar 3D style illustration. CHARACTER: A single little girl (3 year old), jet black medium-length straight hair, deep black eyes, light peach with warm rosy undertones skin, tender compassionate expression, eyes glistening with empathy. OUTFIT: Soft blue tunic with gold leaf embroidery, brown pants, small boots. ACTION: little girl is standing and wrapping both arms around the large round belly of SPARK: A massive baby dragon with the proportions of a puppy but the size of a giant. Spark is a huge creature, TOWERING over the little girl. He has shimmering emerald-green scales, a very chubby and round body, large golden eyes, and small translucent wings. He has a soft cream-colored belly and two tiny horns. His mass is five times larger than the little girl in a tight hug. Spark is TWICE AS TALL as little girl so little girl only reaches Spark's belly. Spark has drooping wings and sad golden eyes, a single tiny tear on cheek, lowering its large head DOWN to rest gently on top of little girl's head for comfort. SETTING: Garden at golden hour WIDE VIEW, warm amber sunset light, autumn leaves floating gently, distant mountains visible on horizon. ATMOSPHERE: Bittersweet tenderness, warm golden sunset glow, comfort and promise, emotional depth. STRICT: Only ONE little girl, only ONE baby dragon Spark. Spark MUST BE TWICE AS TALL as little girl. little girl is 100% human, with a completely normal body, two arms, two legs, smooth skin, and normal child anatomy, no duplicates. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

pages.text: Chispa extendió sus alas, que brillaron con luz dorada. ¡Habían crecido! Anna subió a su espalda y juntos se elevaron sobre las nubes. Volaron sobre valles de arcoíris y ríos de cristal que reflejaban las estrellas. El viento suave acariciaba la cara de Anna mientras reía de felicidad.
pages.text_above: Chispa extendió sus alas, que brillaron con luz dorada. ¡Habían crecido! Anna subió a su espalda y juntos se elevaron sobre las nubes.
pages.text_below: Volaron sobre valles de arcoíris y ríos de cristal que reflejaban las estrellas. El viento suave acariciaba la cara de Anna mientras reía de felicidad.
pages.scene_prompt: Disney Pixar 3D style illustration. CHARACTER: A single little girl (3 year old), jet black medium-length straight hair, deep black eyes, light peach with warm rosy undertones skin, face showing pure joy and exhilaration, medium-length hair neatly in place, laughing with wind in face. OUTFIT: Soft blue tunic with gold leaf embroidery, brown pants, small boots. ACTION: little girl is riding on the back of SPARK: A massive baby dragon with the proportions of a puppy but the size of a giant. Spark is a huge creature, TOWERING over the little girl. He has shimmering emerald-green scales, a very chubby and round body, large golden eyes, and small translucent wings. He has a soft cream-colored belly and two tiny horns. His mass is five times larger than the little girl who has grown large enough to carry little girl comfortably, both soaring through clouds high in the sky. little girl holding gently onto Spark's back, little girl is FULL SIZE not miniaturized. SETTING: High above the clouds WIDE VIEW, rainbow valleys below, crystal blue rivers, candy-colored forests, tiny villages on rolling green hills, golden sunset clouds. ATMOSPHERE: Freedom and exhilaration, magical flight, golden sparkles trailing behind, wind and wonder. STRICT: Only ONE little girl riding ONE dragon Spark, little girl must be NORMAL CHILD SIZE not tiny, dragon is large enough to carry little girl, little girl is 100% human, with a completely normal body, two arms, two legs, smooth skin, and normal child anatomy. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

pages.text: En las Montañas de los Dragones, una familia de hermosos dragones dio la bienvenida a Chispa con rugidos alegres. La mamá dragón, una majestuosa dragona de escamas doradas y ojos amables, inclinó su enorme cabeza ante Anna. "Gracias por cuidar de nuestro pequeño." Chispa le dio a Anna una escama mágica que brillaba como la luz de las estrellas. "Cuando la sostengas, recuerda nuestra amistad." Y Anna supo que la verdadera magia vive en el corazón.
pages.text_above: En las Montañas de los Dragones, una familia de hermosos dragones dio la bienvenida a Chispa con rugidos alegres. La mamá dragón, una majestuosa dragona de escamas doradas y ojos amables, inclinó su enorme cabeza ante Anna. "Gracias por cuidar de nuestro pequeño."
pages.text_below: Chispa le dio a Anna una escama mágica que brillaba como la luz de las estrellas. "Cuando la sostengas, recuerda nuestra amistad." Y Anna supo que la verdadera magia vive en el corazón.
pages.scene_prompt: Disney Pixar 3D style illustration. CHARACTER: A single little girl (3 year old), jet black medium-length straight hair, deep black eyes, light peach with warm rosy undertones skin, smiling with happy tears, holding a glowing starlight dragon scale. OUTFIT: Soft blue tunic with gold leaf embroidery, brown pants, small boots. ACTION: little girl stands on a mountain cliff edge, holding the glowing scale close, looking UP at SPARK: A massive baby dragon with the proportions of a puppy but the size of a giant. Spark is a huge creature, TOWERING over the little girl. He has shimmering emerald-green scales, a very chubby and round body, large golden eyes, and small translucent wings. He has a soft cream-colored belly and two tiny horns. His mass is five times larger than the little girl who looks DOWN with grateful joyful eyes. In the far background, a colossal golden dragoness with warm amber eyes and enormous spread wings bows her head gently. SETTING: Majestic Dragon Mountains WIDE VIEW, purple-blue peaks, crystal waterfalls, golden sunset sky with orange and pink clouds. ATMOSPHERE: Emotional farewell, warm golden light, magical sparkles, friendship and gratitude. STRICT: Only ONE little girl, only ONE baby dragon Spark, one golden dragoness in background. little girl is 100% human with normal child anatomy. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

closing_message: Anna, tu corazón valiente puede hacer florecer la magia en cualquier lugar.
